system.description:
Class: Monk

A monk's training and bodily control creates a hardiness and toughness that makes the monk more resistant than normal to harmful toxins and diseases as well as effects that control, paralyze, or kill. At 1st level, the character gains a +1 bonus to saving throws versus disease, poison, paralysis, polymorph, petrification and death attack. The bonus increases to +2 at 3rd level, +3 at 6th level, +4 at 10th level, and +5 at 15th level.
